roa.docketEntryComment: DEF BAIL HRG MOTION & ORDER RLS ON O,R/BAIL REDUCTION - FILED AT INSISTEN

/CAL:PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/X: AS PART OF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE 19006222 PURSUANT TO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER, /X:ANY RESTITUTION OR OTHER MATTERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BEADDED AS TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO,17013181,/MO PC 1385:PLEA TO 17013181/VD:07-21-20/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE TO BE REMOVED AS TO THIS CASE ONLY/SATERM/

/CAL: BAIL MOTION/X:JASMINE LAM PRESENT ON BEHALF OF APD/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEESIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE/DOP/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT DISCHARGE/CONTD PTD ELIG RPT/GTWM/X:COUNT(S) 1 CHARGING490,2(A) PC, A MISDEMEANOR, ARE REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN ELIGIBILITY REPORT,/OR/CTORD:ANY ACM REQUIREMENT IS TERMINATED/PTDIV:12-13-19/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:RECEIPT OF PTD ELIG RPT/X:DEFENDANT IS PRESENT WITH A POSITIVE ACM REPORT/X:THE COURT GRANTS DEFENSE REQUEST TO MODIFY CUSTODIAL STATUS AS FOLLOWS:/OR/X:PER PTD, THEY NEED A RE-REFERRAL TO PTD/CAUSE/X:THE PEOPLE WAIVE ELIGIBILITY/GTWM/X:COUNT(S)  001   CHARGING       490,2(A) IS REFERREDTO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN ELIGIBILITY REPORT,/PTDIV:10-25-19/CONTD:RECEIPT OF PTD ELIGIBILITY REPORT/DOPU:PTD/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURR,/987,2/X:COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE AND THE DA WAIVES ELIGIBILITY/CONTD PTD ELIG RPT/GTWM/X:COUNT 1 CHARGING490,2(A)PC MISDEMEAOR ARE REFERRED TO PRETRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN ELIGIBILITY REPORT,/PTDIV:09-20-19/ACM/CONTD:PTD ELIG RPT/DOP/
/CAL  BENCH WARRANT/BAIL  5,000/NTW/ /LDTR  07-27-20/CONTD  BAIL MOTIONAND TJ 17013181 ON 06-30-20 IN D50/CONTD: TRIAL ON 07-21-20/DOP/
/CAL: PTD ELIGIBILITY REPORT/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:5000/BWNUM:2ND/X: 3 OF3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/
